name: skills-driven-development
description: The seed colony for Skills-Driven Development — the skillforge meta-skill, methodology docs, a canonical-skills/ pattern CLI, and three reference example colonies (webapp-starter, cli-tool, data-pipeline).

skills.name: skillforge
skills.description: Create or update a reusable agent skill. Use when you notice a repeated pattern, when a workflow should be persisted for future sessions, or when asked to forge/create/scaffold a new skill.

examples.name: webapp-starter
examples.description: Reference colony for a React + TypeScript + Express web application. Demonstrates SkDD skills for component scaffolding, API endpoint generation, deploy-preview automation, and bug triage.

examples.name: cli-tool
examples.description: Reference colony for a cross-platform CLI project (shipctl persona). Demonstrates SkDD skills for release pipelines, build matrices, flag management, man page generation, and breaking-change audits.

examples.name: data-pipeline
examples.description: Reference colony for a Python data-engineering and ML project. Demonstrates SkDD skills for dataset onboarding, ETL pipeline scaffolding, experiment logging, data quality gates, and safe historical backfills.
